zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland於1402年出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾亨德藍德時，她的父親Piers de Cockburn of Henderland38歲，母親Helena De Scott32歲。她於大約1420年與Sir Walter Scott在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1463年在蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾布可洛享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland于1402年出生在苏格兰皮布萊爾亨德藍德时，她的父亲Piers de Cockburn of Henderland38岁，母亲Helena De Scott32岁。她于大约1420年与Sir Walter Scott在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1463年在苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾布可洛享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cockburn,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and northern English: habitational name from a place in Berwickshire named Cockburn, from Old English cocc ‘cock, rooster’ (or the related byname Cocca) + burna ‘stream’ (see Bourne ). This surname is traditionally pronounced Coburn.

variants.name: Bourne
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from southern Middle English bourne, Old English burna, burne ‘spring, stream’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Bourn in Cambridgeshire or Bourne in Lincolnshire. In surnames the reference is often to an old stream called burna, surviving as the name of a farm. This word was replaced as the general word for a stream in southern dialects by Old English brōc (see Brook ) and came to be restricted in meaning to a stream flowing only intermittently, especially in winter.

variants.name: Coburn
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Cockburn  , reflecting the pronunciation.

variants.name: Cobourn
meanings: Scottish and English (Staffordshire): variant of   Cockburn  .

variants.name: Cogburn
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Cockburn  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland was born in 1402, in Henderland, Peeblesshire, Scotland, her father, Piers de Cockburn of Henderland, was 38 and her mother, Helena De Scott, was 32. She married Sir Walter Scott about 1420, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1463, in Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland est née en 1402, à Henderland, Valle de Twede, Écosse, son père, Piers de Cockburn of Henderland, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Helena De Scott, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Scott environ 1420, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1463, à Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland 1402 in Henderland, Peeblesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Piers de Cockburn of Henderland 38 und ihre Mutter Helena De Scott 32. Sie hat um 1420 in Scotland Sir Walter Scott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1463 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland è nata il nel 1402 nel Henderland, Peeblesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Piers de Cockburn of Henderland, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Helena De Scott, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Scott circa 1420, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1463, nel Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderlandが1402年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアヘンダーランドで生まれた時，父Piers de Cockburn of Henderlandは38歳，母Helena De Scottは32歳であった。約1420年にスコットランドでSir Walter Scottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1463年にスコットランドセルキルクシュアイアブククレウチで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland(이)가 1402년 스컷랜드 피블레실르 헨델랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Piers de Cockburn of Henderland(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helena De Scott(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 스컷랜드에서 Sir Walter Scott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 스컷랜드 셀커크실르 버치레우치에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland nasceu em 1402, em Henderland, Peeblesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Piers de Cockburn of Henderland, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Helena De Scott, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Scott aproximadamente 1420, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1463, em Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland родилась в 1402 г. в местности хендирланд, пиблессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Piers de Cockburn of Henderland было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena De Scott, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Scott около 1420 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1463 г. в местности букклеуч, селкиркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Cockburn, Of Henderland nació en 1402, en Henderland, Peeblesshire, Scotland, su papá, Piers de Cockburn of Henderland, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Helena De Scott, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Walter Scott aproximadamente 1420, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1463, en Buccleuch, Selkirkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años.
